tldr: Risk-off rotation in semis and storage contrasts with a broad software/tech rally; M&A activity remains elevated with multiple deal votes and filings, while analyst upgrades tilt toward semis and energy.

bullets.text: ON Semiconductor -23.7% after announcing acquisition of Synaptics; both companies filed 425s on the proposed business combination.
WDC -13.2%, STX -12.2%, and SNDK -10.5% all with no catalyst on file; SNDK saw $25.9M in $1500 call premium at 3dte.
MU -6.7% with heavy two-way options flow: $26.7M in $1200 calls, $21.3M in $1150 calls, $17.6M in $800 calls, and $25.4M in $1100 puts, all 3dte.
KEYS -8.7% and MPWR -8.7% with no catalyst on file.
MRNA +12.6%, FDS +11.0%, NOW +9.9%, WDAY +9.2%, and VEEV +8.4% all with no catalyst on file.
DDOG +8.5% with no catalyst on file, also upgraded Hold→Buy at Truist Securities with PT 300.
SEM stockholders approved take-private merger with Ortenzio/Jackson/WCAS consortium.
UUUU filed definitive merger agreement to acquire Vacuumschmelze for ~$718M cash plus shares.
VTOL to acquire Berry Aviation for $105M and exit Norway offshore.
NFG received PUCO approval for $2.62B Vectren Ohio acquisition.
NFBK shareholders approved Columbia Financial merger.
CAPR announced FDA Advisory Committee set for July 29 to review Deramiocel BLA.
GT CFO Zamarro to depart; Deakin named interim CFO.
QCOM upgraded Underweight→Equal-Weight at Morgan Stanley (PT 231); IBM upgraded Neutral→Overweight at JP Morgan (PT 291); SNPS upgraded Neutral→Overweight at Piper Sandler (PT 550).
XOM upgraded Neutral→Buy at BofA (PT 154); COP upgraded Neutral→Buy at Roth Capital (PT 130); PLTR upgraded Underperform→Peer Perform at Wolfe Research.
HD downgraded Outperform→Peer Perform at Wolfe Research; AAPL downgraded Outperform→Hold at KGI Securities (PT 315); PLD downgraded Sector Outperform→Sector Perform at Scotiabank (PT 146).
